narrative:
Jackson Twp township has 1,339 registered voters, with 51.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 37.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 27.2 percentage points.
